bio: We are a community of seekers who believe in the power of social empathy and free will. We value individuality and diversity, and strive to create a world where everyone has the freedom to pursue their passions and connect with others.
name: Seekers_Reformed_1_Orthodox_1_Orthodox_2_Reformed_4
ideology: 賢者3:  社会連結自由意志 (Social Empathy Free Will)
